nasb.text: He acted valiantly and defeated the Amalekites, and delivered Israel from the hands of those who plundered them.

esv.text: And he did valiantly and struck the Amalekites and delivered Israel out of the hands of those who plundered them.

cnv.text: 掃羅行事勇敢，擊敗了亞瑪力人，把以色列人從搶掠他們的人手中救了出來。

ccb.text: 他奋勇杀敌，打败了亚玛力人，从掠夺者手中救出以色列人。
